queries.query: timeseries avg(builtin:service.response.time), by:{dt.entity.service} | filter dt.entity.service contains 'accountservice' or dt.entity.service contains 'broker-service' or dt.entity.service contains 'calculationservice' or dt.entity.service contains 'frontend' or dt.entity.service contains 'contentcreator' or dt.entity.service contains 'reverseproxy'

timeseries avg(builtin:service.errors.total), by:{dt.entity.service} | filter dt.entity.service contains 'accountservice' or dt.entity.service contains 'broker-service' or dt.entity.service contains 'calculationservice' or dt.entity.service contains 'frontend' or dt.entity.service contains 'contentcreator' or dt.entity.service contains 'reverseproxy'
